resource.name: BarcodeReceivedError
resource.object: Error procesando el codigo de barras

resource.name: BarcodeReceivedError
resource.object: Error procesando el Código de Barras

resource.name: SupplierNotFound.Text
resource.object: This supplier does not exist. \n\r Type a correct one.

resource.name: TransporterNotFound.Text
resource.object: This transporter does not exist. \n\r Type a correct one.

resource.name: NewProducerCodeError.Text
resource.object: The length of the producer code is incorrect.

resource.name: NewProducerCodeWrong.Text
resource.object: The length of the producer code is not correct.

resource.name: DateTimeFormatError.Text
resource.object: The format is not correct. Enter a correct date time.

resource.name: ValidEarTagMessage
resource.object: El campo Arete debe tener un valor

resource.name: RecordingFromWeight
resource.object: Attempting to create a record from received weight.

resource.name: ErrorCaptionRequestByPassAnimal
resource.object: No es posible crear el ByPass Animal

resource.name: NewAnimalMessage
resource.object: Un nuevo animal ha sido creado con el Arete: {0}

resource.name: newAnimalQuestion
resource.object: ¿Seguro que desea crear un Nuevo Animal?

resource.name: uniqueEarTag
resource.object: Arete en uso, digite un Arete no repetido

resource.name: EarTag
resource.object: Ingrese Arete, deje en blanco para autogenerar.

resource.name: ColorField.Help
resource.object: Enter the color of the hide

resource.name: Validation.EartagMustHave12Digits
resource.object: Eartag must be exactly 12 digits long

resource.name: Validation.CategoryMissing
resource.object: You must provide a valid category

resource.name: Validation.ColorMissing
resource.object: You must provide a valid color

resource.name: NextHoohError.Message
resource.object: Es necesario un animal seleccionado para mover el gancho.

resource.name: RecordingFromWeight
resource.object: Attempting to create a record from received weight.

resource.name: RecordingFromBarcode
resource.object: Attempting to create a record from received barcode.

resource.name: PromptTextUseQueuedKillNumber
resource.object: Do you want to use the selected slaughter code from the queue ?

resource.name: IndividualMismatch
resource.object: Media res de distinto animal. Arete: {0}

resource.name: LogMessageKillNumberRegistered
resource.object: Slaughter code {0} has already been used for section type {1}

resource.name: AnimalsFoundForNumber
resource.object: Many animals found for kill number

resource.name: Age.Help
resource.object: Enter the age of the animal.

resource.name: LabelCount.Help
resource.object: Enter number of labels to print.

resource.object: El largo del código del Productor no es correcto.

resource.object: Error en el código del Productor.

resource.object: Error en el Código de Criador.

resource.object: Attempting to create a record from received weight.
